title: dryopteris championii
intro: Dryopteris championii, also known as the Chinese scaly male fern or the Champion's male fern, is a species of fern native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Dryopteris championii is traditionally prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, and it is also used in some modern herbal preparations, but its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
